Nimbus Notes Security and Compliance

Nimbus Notes encrypts every note with AES-256 both in transit and at rest. Encryption keys are rotated automatically every 90 days and are never shared across customer accounts.

Certifications

Nimbus Notes is SOC 2 Type II certified as of this year. An independent auditor reviews the certification annually, and the current report is available on request for Team plan customers.

Data residency

Customer data is stored in data centers located in the United States and the European Union. Team plan customers can choose which region their data is stored in at signup; this cannot be changed afterward without contacting support.

Company

Nimbus Notes is developed by a small remote team headquartered in Toronto, Canada, and has been operating since 2019.
